samples.text: All insects are animals. A spoon is not an insect. Therefore, is a spoon an animal?
Every insect belongs to the category of animals. A spoon is not an insect. Does it follow that a spoon is an animal?
All arthropods are animals. A metal spoon is not an arthropod. Therefore, is a metal spoon an animal?
A spoon is not in the group of insects. Only insects are stated to be animals here. Based on this, is a spoon an animal?
All insects are animals. A spoon is not an insect. The weather today is cloudy. Therefore, is a spoon an animal?
